content: (The location is now Sons of Skyrim Military Camp.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Stormcloak Soldier, Frea, Lydia, Horse)

Stormcloak Soldier: Look at that sky tonight, clear as a fresh-forged blade. Makes you wonder if the gods are watching over our camp here in the Sons of Skyrim. Stormcloak Soldier 2: Aye, Dibella's favor no doubt, blessing us with beauty even in these dark hours.

(*You are observing the following:* The scene unfolds in a frigid, wintry wilderness under a starry night sky dominated by vibrant aurora borealis, with swirling ribbons of purple and green light dancing across the heavens. A pale, crescent moon hangs low on the horizon, casting a soft glow over the snow-blanketed landscape. Tall evergreen trees, their branches heavy with fresh snow, stand densely clustered on either side, their dark needles contrasting sharply against the white ground and icy blue tones of the terrain. In the foreground, a rugged path winds through the scene, flanked by rocky outcrops dusted in snow and patches of evergreen shrubs peeking through the drifts. To the right, a small encampment comes into view: several canvas tents pitched around a central campfire that crackles with warm orange flames, illuminating nearby wooden crates, fur-lined bedrolls, and scattered gear. The camp appears makeshift and fortified, with low stone walls and stakes suggesting a military outpost in this remote, frozen expanse. Faint text overlays hover in the air near the camp, labeling it as a "Stormcloak" site in the "Hjaalmarch" region, evoking a sense of ongoing conflict in this harsh northern setting.)
(The location is now Skyrim.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Frea, Lydia, Serana, rabbit, Goat)

(*You are observing the following:* In this scene, a starry night sky dominates the view, illuminated by vibrant aurora borealis displaying swirling bands of purple, blue, and green hues that stretch across the horizon. Dense clusters of evergreen trees, their branches heavy with snow, line the foreground and midground, creating a forested expanse on a gently sloping, snow-covered hillside. A small wooden cabin sits nestled among the trees, its roof blanketed in white and warm orange light flickering from an open doorway or window, suggesting a fire within. Nearby, a brighter orange glow emanates from what appears to be a campfire or scattered embers on the snowy ground, casting subtle shadows. Jagged rocks and fallen logs protrude through the deep snow, adding texture to the rugged terrain underfoot. At the lower edge of the view, faint overlays resembling interface elements—such as horizontal bars and small icons—hover transparently, possibly indicating navigational or status indicators.)
